name: Peng
overview: Saying goodbye to her twenties, thirty-year-old Go Sa Ri welcomes this new decade of her life with open arms. Leaving behind the tangled mess of her twenties, Sa Ri is ready to make a fresh start. But walking away from the past is proving more difficult than she ever imagined.

trailers.title: 30살 됐더니 별별 남자 다 꼬인다 [팽] 티저
